notes: Scraped from brita.co.uk (UK professional site). Product images are lazy-loaded via JavaScript on the live site (Magnolia CMS), so image URLs resolve to placeholder.jpg in static fetches. Image alt texts and datasheet PDF JCR asset paths are recorded instead. The 'br-purityfinest' (PURITY Finest) product has no dedicated public product page — it appears only in the product overview listing at /filter-accessories-spare-parts.

products.name: BRITA AquaGusto
image_alt_texts: BRITA filter AquaGusto pad front view

specs.connection: Fits all conventional water tanks — no adapter or assembly required
specs.application: Coffee and espresso machines with water tank

products.description: A practical filter solution for coffee and espresso machines with water tanks. Enhances coffee flavour, aroma and appearance while reducing limescale deposits. Fits all conventional water tanks without adapters or assembly. Includes automatic filter exchange signal. Lasts up to six months.

products.name: BRITA AquaAroma
image_alt_texts: BRITA filter AquaAroma

specs.application: Coffee machines with gravity-fed integrated water tanks
specs.installation: Easy installation and exchange by user — no professional installer required

products.description: Compact water filtration solution designed for mobile coffee machines with gravity-operated integrated tanks. Delivers improved coffee taste and aroma while reducing limescale buildup to protect equipment and minimise maintenance costs. Easy installation and cartridge exchange.

products.name: BRITA AquaAroma Crema

BRITA filter AquaAroma Crema machine

specs.technology: Activated carbon + limescale reduction with adjustable aroma ring
specs.application: Espresso and coffee machines with suction-operated tank systems
specs.key_feature: Constant water pressure and temperature during entire brewing process; adjustable aroma ring for local water quality adaptation

products.description: Advanced tank series filter for espresso and coffee machines with suction-operated tank systems. Features an adjustable aroma ring for local water quality customisation. Delivers enhanced crema, taste and aroma with consistent pressure and temperature throughout brewing. Reduces limescale and operating costs.

products.name: BRITA ProGuard
products.description: Not found on brita.co.uk or brita.de professional sites. 'ProGuard' does not appear to be a current active product in the Brita Professional Filter range as of 2026. May be a legacy or market-specific product.
products.scraping_note: No dedicated page found. Product name not present in UK, DE, or international professional filter catalogues scraped.

specs.technology: Four-stage BRITA Systematic Filtration with IntelliBypass
specs.application: Coffee/espresso machines, vending machines, combi steamers, ovens

products.description: Professional water filter cartridge that expertly reduces limescale deposits across many professional applications. Four-stage decarbonisation using Trusted Systematic Filter Technology. IntelliBypass technology maintains consistent water quality regardless of flow rates. Suitable for coffee machines, espresso systems, vending equipment, combi steamers and ovens.

specs.technology: Four-stage BRITA Systematic Filtration (total hardness reduction)
specs.application: Espresso machines — creates ideal mineral composition for full bean aroma

products.description: Professional water filter designed for espresso machines. Creates the ideal mineral composition for unfolding beans' full aroma. Reduces substances that can negatively affect espresso taste and aroma. Employs BRITA Systematic Filter Technology with four stages including total hardness reduction for optimum crema.

specs.technology: Three-stage activated carbon filtration (no carbonate hardness reduction)
specs.bypass: Not applicable (designed for soft water areas)
specs.application: Coffee machines, espresso machines, vending machines in soft water areas

products.description: Professional water filter cartridge designed specifically for soft water areas. Three-step systematic filtration technology including pre-filtration, activated carbon filtration and fine filtration. Optimised for hot water applications such as coffee and tea. Features rapid-change system with innovative locking handle and integrated flush valve.

specs.application: Coffee/espresso/vending machines, catering and food service

products.description: Professional water filtration cartridge that decarbonises water using proven BRITA Systematic Filtration Technology. Reduces taste and aroma-impairing substances. Variable bypass settings for adjusting to local water quality. Protects appliances by reducing limescale deposits. Suitable for catering, vending and food service applications.

specs.application: Small to mid-sized combi steamers and ovens

Trusted Systematic Filter Technology reduces limescale and taste-impairing substances, enhancing food quality while protecting equipment from downtime. Four-stage filtration with flow rate up to 300 l/h.

Provides ideal water quality for combi steamers and conventional ovens while enhancing taste and protecting appliances from limescale buildup. Three-step decarbonisation with IntelliBypass technology. Flow rate up to 500 l/h.

BRITA filter PURITY clean glass with dishwasher
BRITA filter PURITY Clean barista coffee machine
BRITA filter PURITY Clean fine dining glasses
BRITA filter PURITY Clean fine dining restaurant
BRITA filter PURITY Clean clean glass
products.description: Professional dishwasher filter using partial demineralisation technology. Prevents limescale deposits, eliminating the need for hand polishing while protecting machine longevity. Delivers streak-free glassware, unmarked crockery and cutlery. Increases dishwasher lifespan by reducing limescale deposits.

products.name: BRITA PURITY Clean Extra
image_alt_texts: BRITA filter PURITY Clean range
BRITA filter PURITY Clean Extra filtration
products.description: Advanced professional dishwasher filter using total demineralisation for highest-demand applications. Satisfies highest demands with sparkling glasses, gleaming white crockery and cutlery without streaks and marks. Ideal for premium hospitality settings requiring exceptional results and complete limescale prevention.

BRITA filter PURITY C1000 AC filtration

specs.technology: Two-stage activated carbon filtration (no carbonate hardness reduction)
specs.application: Cold drink dispensers and vending systems

products.description: Professional water filter for cold drink dispensers and vending systems. Employs Trusted Systematic Filter Technology with two-stage activated carbon filtration to optimise water taste, aroma and clarity. Filters particles down to 0.5 µm. Compliant with NSF Standard 42.

products.name: BRITA PURITY Finest

specs.application: Food and beverage filtration — fine dining and catering

products.description: Professional filter cartridge for food and beverage applications. Optimally filtered water for food and beverages — 'Your guests and appliances deserve the best.' Larger-format equivalent to PURITY C Finest for high-volume fine dining and catering environments.
products.scraping_note: No dedicated public product page found on brita.co.uk or brita.de. Product is listed in the professional filter accessories overview at /filter-accessories-spare-parts but links to the partner-only online shop requiring login. Detailed specs (capacity table, sizes, pressure) not publicly accessible. The product is confirmed to exist in the 2025/2026 catalogue.

image_access_note: All brita.co.uk and brita.de professional product pages use Magnolia CMS with JavaScript lazy-loading. Static HTML fetches only return a single CDN placeholder: https://cdn.brita.net/.imaging/opt/1/dam/jcr:5f557b0f-65a2-444a-ad05-0672d3ac3877/placeholder.jpg — this is the same for all products. Real product images require a browser with JavaScript enabled to render. Image JCR UUIDs can be seen in the page source only after full JS execution. Actual image CDN pattern would be: https://cdn.brita.net/.imaging/opt/1/dam/jcr:<UUID>/<filename>.jpg
